name: Epiko
description: Epiko is a global entertainment ecosystem that reimagines the world’s great epics, myths, and legends for modern audiences through games, digital collectibles, AI-powered creativity tools, and community-driven experiences. Developed by Wharf Street Studios, Epiko blends cultural inspirations from multiple regions — including South Asia, Africa, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America — into a cohesive entertainment universe designed for a worldwide audience. Instead of building a single game or a single show, Epiko is building an interconnected ecosystem where: • Players experience stories through games and interactive worlds. • Fans engage through events, collectibles, and social features. • Creators and studios participate through AI-powered tools and tokenized incentives.
